name: Axis ACE Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Lifetime free for first year; renewal waived on spending ₹2,00,000 in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 5% cashback on utility bill payments made through Google Pay
4% cashback on Swiggy and Zomato orders

cappedCategories.description: 5% cashback on Google Pay bills capped at ₹500 per month

additionalBenefits: Lifetime free card with zero joining fee
Flat 2% cashback on all spends - no category restrictions
5% cashback on Google Pay bill payments
4 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year
pros: Zero joining fee - lifetime free for the first year
Flat 2% cashback on all spends is excellent for a free card
5% cashback on bill payments via Google Pay saves on utilities
4 domestic lounge visits per year is rare for a mid-tier card
Automatic cashback with no manual redemption hassle
cons: Google Pay bill payment cashback is capped at ₹500/month
3.5% foreign currency markup is on the higher side
Renewal fee of ₹499 applies if spend threshold not met
idealFor: Users who want a strong flat cashback card with no annual fee
Google Pay users who pay utility bills regularly
Everyday spenders looking for hassle-free automatic cashback

faqs.question: Is the Axis ACE card really lifetime free?
faqs.answer: The first year is completely free with zero joining fee. From the second year, a renewal fee of ₹499 applies, which is waived if you spend ₹2 lakh or more in the previous year.

faqs.question: How does the 5% cashback on Google Pay work?
faqs.answer: When you pay utility bills (electricity, gas, broadband, etc.) through Google Pay using the Axis ACE card, you get 5% cashback. This is capped at ₹500 per billing cycle.

faqs.question: Do I get cashback on all purchases?
faqs.answer: Yes, you get a flat 2% cashback on all spends except excluded categories like fuel, wallet loading, rent, and EMI conversions. Swiggy and Zomato earn an even higher 4% cashback.

faqs.question: Does the Axis ACE card offer lounge access?
faqs.answer: Yes, you get 4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year through Dreamfolks. International lounge access is not included.
